_provenance: Reconstructed from GitHub issue #2130 logs. The runner extracted token_id=5468420 from the receipt; the LP_OPEN had already landed on-chain when save_position_event raised UNIMPLEMENTED.
_note_on_pih: UniV3 identity tuple is (token_id, nft_manager_addr, chain) per blueprints/28-position-registry.md §3.2. Matching the production extract_registry_payload_open shape; specific bytes here are hand-derived for determinism (no fork-block dependency).
